content.text:
<user_query>
Search through my recent agent transcripts to find conversations about: anthropic
</user_query>

Searching agent transcripts for mentions of "anthropic".

[REDACTED]

Gathering which transcripts mention Anthropic and extracting conversation topics (excluding subagent transcripts per instructions).

[REDACTED]

Here are the **parent** agent transcripts that mention Anthropic (API/provider), ranked by relevance.

## Primary: Concierge → Anthropic migration

**[Concierge handoff & Anthropic switch](85f482cd-872a-4f9e-9ac8-ef1eda014fb5)** — **59 mentions** (main thread)

| Topic | What happened |
|--------|----------------|
| **Starting problem** | Discovery handoff failed; concierge said discovery would start but didn’t delegate correctly. |
| **Root cause** | OpenAI **Responses API chaining** (`previous_response_id`) dropped dynamic system prompt / workflow state — not bad router prompt text. Repro compared OpenAI vs Anthropic in `scripts/_debug_router_repro.py`. |
| **Your call (Jun 3)** | Stop fighting chaining + dynamic prompts; **switch to Anthropic short term**; avoid dynamic prompts for now. |
| **Implementation** | `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` in settings; `Claude` in `ModelTiers`; router on Opus; **`MODEL_ROUTER` → `MODEL_ANTHROPIC_HARD`**; Sonnet 4.6 as `anthropic_medium`; all 6 concierge agents on `claude-opus-4-7`. |
| **Follow-ups** | `pip install anthropic` ImportError; confirm whole concierge team uses Anthropic; remove **`AGENTOS_CAPTURE_OPENAI_RESPONSES`** (OpenAI-only forensics). |

Representative user messages in that thread:
- *“short term we'll switch to non opnai, maybe anthropic”*
- *“so which agents are using anthropic? all concierge team i hope”*
- *“use 4.7 everywhere… sonnet 4.6 should be listed as medium”*
- *“rename MODEL_ROUTER to model anthropic hard”*

---

## Secondary: Langfuse consolidation (Anthropic as side WIP)

**[Langfuse prompt consolidation](19a2d8b9-b85e-4823-9cd9-dfc01ef454b7)** — **1 mention**

Consolidated discovery and other concierge member prompts into Langfuse ([PR #192](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/pull/192)). When babysitting, the agent noted **unstaged local WIP** that switched Discovery/Reimaginer/Planner to `MODEL_ANTHROPIC_HARD` and wired `model=` in `main.py` — **reverted** so it wouldn’t land on that PR. Anthropic work here is incidental, not the main goal.

---

## Tangential / false positives

| Transcript | Why it matched |
|------------|----------------|
| **[Concierge routing & handoff design](608687b7-01ff-47ad-83eb-8310eab206dd)** | Tool grep for `anthropic|claude|bedrock` while debugging routing — not an Anthropic migration thread. |
| **[Strict lint guardrails](da4ffd93-fdc5-4848-8014-8c9028a29415)** | `claude_exec.py`, `SshClaudeClient` — **Claude Code over SSH**, not the Anthropic API. |
| **[In-process provisioner](d5be264c-252b-4580-b65e-5ba27988715c)** / **[Provisioner build-or-fix](11ab1d30-43a8-42cc-a958-c53ade325a16)** | Same: devpod SSH + Claude Code runners. |
| **[npmrc & Docker setup](71d85310-6dad-4fe7-a670-eacfa751a4f2)** | Only touched `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=` in `.env` next to other env vars. |
| **[Headless rethinker tools](8fcea5ad-7333-435a-aaa4-cff019b5d07b)** | “SSH + Claude” in validity/coder comparison table. |

---

## Summary

If you care about **Anthropic as the LLM provider for Concierge**, almost everything lives in **[85f482cd-872a-4f9e-9ac8-ef1eda014fb5](85f482cd-872a-4f9e-9ac8-ef1eda014fb5)**. **[19a2d8b9-b85e-4823-9cd9-dfc01ef454b7](19a2d8b9-b85e-4823-9cd9-dfc01ef454b7)** only references the same model-tier work as leftover WIP on the Langfuse PR.

**Security note:** That handoff-debug transcript includes shell commands with API keys in plain text. If those keys are real, rotate them and avoid re-pasting that transcript.

[REDACTED]
